title: Iran TV Shows Tehran Destruction After US-Israel Attacks
description: Iranian TV released footage on Saturday showing destruction in Tehran after the US and Israel  launched an attack on Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)
content: Iranian TV released footage on Saturday showing destruction in Tehran after the US and Israel  launched an attack on Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)
